ui.levelIncreaseBaseStacks: Acúmulos base de todos os módulos +

active_modifiers.name: TODO:Blackout Pulse
active_modifiers.desc: TODO:Activate to release an EMP pulse that destroys enemy gadgets and shocks all enemies in a radius (10m base, plus 0.5m per Offensive stack).
active_modifiers.desc_template: TODO:Activate to release an EMP pulse that destroys enemy gadgets and shocks all enemies within {{emp_radius}} (10m base, plus 0.5m per Offensive stack).

active_modifiers.name: TODO:Cloud Armor
active_modifiers.desc: TODO:Activate to repair armor for yourself and allies inside a 10m radius, at a rate of total Armor/second (5% base, plus 0.2% per Defensive stack). This effect lasts for a total of 10 seconds.
active_modifiers.desc_template: TODO:Activate to repair armor for yourself and allies inside a 10m radius, at a rate of {{repair_per_sec}} total Armor/second (5% base, plus 0.2% per Defensive stack). This effect lasts for a total of 10 seconds.

active_modifiers.name: TODO:Optimize / Overload
active_modifiers.desc: TODO:Activate to reduce your active skill cooldowns (30% base, plus 0.8% per Utility stack).
active_modifiers.desc_template: TODO:Activate to reduce your active skill cooldowns by {{skill_cdr}} (30% base, plus 0.8% per Utility stack).

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Amplify
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Offense stacks by 5.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Consume
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Offense stacks by 10, decrease Defense and Utility stacks by 5 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Saturate
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Offense stacks by 25, but Offense stacks no longer affect Weapon Handling, Headshot Damage, or Magazine Size.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Pivot
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase the lowest module stacks by 15, decrease Offense stacks by 10. If Offense is lowest, or Defense and Utility tie for lowest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Split
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Offense stacks by 15, increase Defense and Utility stacks by 10 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Compress
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Offense stacks by 10, but each Offense stack is 50% more potent when calculating affected stats.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 1
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Offense stacks no longer affect Weapon Handling; instead they increase Headshot Damage at 3% per Offense stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 2
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Offense stacks no longer affect Weapon Handling; instead they increase Magazine Size at 1% per Offense stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Stabilize
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Offense stacks are locked and cannot change. Their base value may still increase by leveling up Blackout Pulse.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Invert
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Swap Offense stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Offense is already highest, or Defense and Utility tie for highest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Amplify
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Defense stacks by 5.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Consume
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Defense stacks by 10, decrease Offense and Utility stacks by 5 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Saturate
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Defense stacks by 25, but Defense stacks no longer affect Armor, Protection from Elites, or Hazard Protection.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Pivot
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase the lowest module stacks by 15, decrease Defense stacks by 10. If Defense is lowest, or Offense and Utility tie for lowest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Split
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Defense stacks by 15, increase Offense and Utility stacks by 10 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Compress
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Defense stacks by 10, but each Defense stack is 50% more potent when calculating affected stats.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 1
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Defense stacks no longer affect Armor; instead they increase Protection from Elites at 0.5% per Defense stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 2
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Defense stacks no longer affect Armor; instead they increase Hazard Protection at 1% per Defense stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Stabilize
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Defense stacks are locked and cannot change. Their base value may still increase by leveling up Cloud Armor.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Invert
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Swap Defense stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Defense is already highest, or Offense and Utility tie for highest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Amplify
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Utility stacks by 5.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Consume
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Utility stacks by 10, decrease Offense and Defense stacks by 5 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Saturate
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase Utility stacks by 25, but Utility stacks no longer affect Skill Damage, Skill Repair, or Status Effects.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Pivot
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase the lowest module stacks by 15, decrease Utility stacks by 10. If Utility is lowest, or Offense and Defense tie for lowest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Split
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Utility stacks by 15, increase Offense and Defense stacks by 10 each.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Compress
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Decrease Utility stacks by 10, but each Utility stack is 50% more potent when calculating affected stats.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 1
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Utility stacks no longer affect Skill Damage; instead they increase Skill Repair at 1% per Utility stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Convert 2
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Utility stacks no longer affect Skill Damage; instead they increase Status Effects at 1% per Utility stack.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Stabilize
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Utility stacks are locked and cannot change. Their base value may still increase by leveling up Optimize/Overload.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Invert
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Swap Utility stacks with the current highest module stacks. If Utility is already highest, or Offense and Defense tie for highest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Cascade
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Stats and Active Modifiers are no longer affected by the highest module stacks, but half of that value is added to each of the other two modules. If two or more modules tie for highest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Converge
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Increase the lowest module stacks by the average of the other two stacks, but set those two stacks to 0. If two or more modules tie for lowest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Equalize
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:All module stacks become equal to the middle-value stack. If the middle-value stack equals either highest or lowest, nothing happens.

passive_modifiers.name: TODO:Nullify
passive_modifiers.desc: TODO:Reverse value changes that have been applied to the lowest module stacks (additions become subtractions and vice versa). Invert modifiers are not affected.
